message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the centre and should have a star of 4
The hotel should include free parking
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 3 people and 5 nights starting from sunday
If the booking fails how about 3 nights
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve korean food and should be in the same area as the hotel
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for the same group of people at 14:15 on the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
